name: Chicken Breast,stove Top
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken breasts in oil.
2. Add the apple juice and cut-up pears to the pan with the cooked chicken.
3. Add the seasoning packet from the stuffing mix.
4. Cover and cook over medium heat for 5-10 minutes.
5. Remove from the stove and add the remaining stuffing mix.
6. Stir and cover, then set aside for an additional 5 minutes.
